untranslatable_reason: Signal requires double channel normalization (CN{CN(Series_1, n=10) - CN(S&P_500, n=10), n=100}) which is not available in the allowed indicators list. The normalization of a divergence indicator through dual-layer channel calculations, cross-series comparative normalization, and correlation-weighted position sizing cannot be expressed using only the provided indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume/Vol, Position, Previous Bar, Returns, Bar Props). Additionally, 'volatility regime stability check' and inverse position sizing based on S&P 500 correlation are not directly expressible.
translation_notes: This signal describes an advanced multi-series normalization technique that requires: (1) custom divergence calculation between two series, (2) nested channel normalization, (3) correlation-based position sizing, and (4) regime stability filtering. None of these components can be replicated with the available indicators. The core concept—making divergence signals comparable across different volatility regimes by normalizing through benchmarks—requires custom indicator programming beyond the backtest engine's current capability.
